highlights_headline: This release adds .NET 11 WASM support, syncs the Skia m151 engine, and fixes a native resource leak.
highlights_body: Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries land for WASM on .NET 11, the bundled Skia engine is updated with upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes, and a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData is resolved.

bullets.lead: Skia m151 upstream bug fixes merged
bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine is synced with chrome/m151 bug fixes from upstream, keeping rendering correctness and stability current.
Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for WebAssembly targets on .NET 11.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: A native handle was leaked when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI). The resource is now correctly released.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries enabling WASM support for .NET 11
